A.evidence: Heavy LOC tags, duplicated abstract/intro lines, massive hallucinated repeated URL, no usable visible tables and only minimal title math.

B.evidence: Prose/order mostly faithful, but Table 1 columns are shifted with Params blank, and Eq.2 has MSA misread as MS.

C.evidence: Text, formulas, and Table 1 are accurate, but output is interleaved JSON layout records rather than clean Markdown and includes sidebar/header artifacts.

D.evidence: Main prose is mostly present, but equations are badly garbled and Table 1 loses most numeric columns/row structure.

E.evidence: Excellent prose and equations, but visible Table 1 is omitted entirely while surrounding text continues past it.

F.evidence: Prose and Table 1 are good, but displayed equations are mostly replaced by formula-not-decoded placeholders/gibberish.

G.evidence: Faithful prose, equations, image/caption placement, and Table 1; minor artifacts include repeated page headers and sidebar/page-anchor noise.

H.evidence: Good prose, equations, and Table 1, but excessive citation anchors/link markup and inconsistent heading levels clutter reading order.
